payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall, single-door dark stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and narrow raised frame, vertical wood grain visible, low-gloss finish, no visible hardware; full door visible in crop under dim lighting — estimated ~1.5 m from camera.
